content:
Saturn in Aries: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Saturn in Aries blends the archetypal drive of Saturn (where you face discipline, responsibility, and long-term mastery) with the Fire, cardinal nature of Aries.

  • Planet: Saturn — structure, discipline, responsibility, limitation, mastery
  • Sign: Aries (Fire/Cardinal) — initiation, courage, action, pioneer, impulse

Eastern Perspective
